acceptance.baseline: Grounding was not previously isolated; mixed residual p95 23.4 mm and max 26.7 mm are not directly comparable
acceptance.after: 32 records; grounding p95 1.986e-12 mm, max 3.553e-12 mm; disabled-chain identity 0 m; replay max 3.553e-12 mm
acceptance.target: p95 <=1.0 mm, max <=2.0 mm, identity <=1e-6 m

acceptance.after: Identical metrics, thresholds, self-check payload, and PPM hashes

changes: threed/racketsport/coordinates.py:1 added seven typed coordinate spaces, homography conventions, canonical extrinsic transforms, exactly-once translation, and blessed K builder.
threed/racketsport/mhr_decode.py:552 preserved the public apply_pred_cam_t_once API while delegating to coordinates.apply_translation_once; preserved the pre-existing line-3 docstring edit.

scripts/racketsport/attribute_body_decode_residual.py:49 added the residual-attribution CLI with present-bucket loading, real grounding/postchain replay, stage snapshots, replay validation, and fail-soft FK/head measurement.
scripts/racketsport/synthetic_body_decode_gate.py:53 wired checkpoint/runtime arguments and the real MHR mesh, 512px shaded renderer, two-attempt kill rule, and production Fast-SAM adapter.
scripts/racketsport/gate_check_body_decode.py:148 added attribution embedding; line 435 adds explicit measured/absent vertices accounting without changing thresholds.
tests/racketsport/test_coordinates_api.py:1 added lightweight-import, transform, translation, and K-builder coverage.
tests/racketsport/test_attribute_body_decode_residual.py:1 added banked 32-record, identity, snapshot, help, and scaffold coverage.
tests/racketsport/test_synthetic_body_decode_gate.py:65 added measured-adapter, unavailable-runtime, and two-attempt blocked-status coverage.

runs/lanes/ns014_p22residual_20260709/lane_report.json:1 saved detailed deliverable results, artifacts, assumptions, consolidation map, deferred fenced hunk, best-stack confirmation, and dated handoff.

full_suite.failure_notes: Exact baseline/post failure set: test_court_keypoint_post_save_rejects_missing_or_wrong_token, test_court_keypoint_post_save_accepts_correct_token, test_court_keypoint_served_page_embeds_save_token_not_placeholder, test_review_input_post_save_rejects_missing_or_wrong_token, test_review_input_post_save_accepts_correct_token, and test_review_input_served_pages_embed_save_token_not_placeholder all fail because the sandbox denies localhost bind(); test_north_star_is_the_single_product_and_execution_authority fails because protected NORTH_STAR_ROADMAP.md has 510 lines versus <=500.

honest_issues: A1 is not green. Its only failure requires editing fenced, manager-owned NORTH_STAR_ROADMAP.md; an unapplied inline compression hunk is recorded in lane_report.json.
MHR/Fast-SAM is unavailable on this Mac due to missing roma. The synthetic SAM3D artifact honestly reports blocked_sam3d_runtime_unavailable; no GPU measurement is claimed.
The banked raw buckets contain players 20 and 21, not player 18 as stated in the mission.
The banked fixture uses the all-disabled raw postchain preset. It proves grounding determinism and snapshot/identity mechanics, but does not quantify enabled production-stage deltas.
body_mesh.json is absent from the banked fixture, so replay validation measures skeleton3d; vertices absence is explicit rather than presented as measured.
The storage-policy audit remains red because allowlisted large source packages are absent from this checkout; it found no unknown large files.

(c) No stack delta: measurement/API lane; no model, weights, or promoted-policy change; all gate thresholds byte-unchanged. configs/racketsport/best_stack.json retained SHA-256 6ec18489f79605e76cbf9f990a07ffcd9950fb35ea64c211e109ba5575c9a315.
These measurements are not accuracy proof or a capability promotion; VERIFIED=0 remains binding.
next: Manager should run the synthetic sam3d arm on the GPU VM, run attribution on a default-postchain run with body_mesh.json and complete raw buckets, and separately resolve the fenced roadmap line-count failure.
